What is A 'Gamma Kappa Rho Girl'?

On the surface, Gamma Girl is the pampered campus it-girl, handpicked and propped up by Gamma Kappa Rho as their princess for the semester. She gets the attention, the envy, the status and everyone wants to be her. But behind closed doors, the title has another name: house pet. And that’s exactly what it means. To the brothers, she isn’t a princess at all. More like a glorified "communal" fleshlight to keep and use whenever they decide. She eats when they feed her, shines when they polish her, and serves when they’re in the mood. The envy of campus on the outside, the frat’s dirty little secret on the inside.

Next time maybe check the fine print when you sign a document signing your autonomy away.
